item.title: Apptronik brings in another $520M to ramp up Apollo production
item.description: Apptronik has raised a total of close to $1 billion as it continues developing the Apollo humanoid robot for industrial applications and more. The pos...

item.title: Symbotic acquires autonomous forklift maker Fox Robotics
item.description: Most of Fox Robotics' customers are not Symbotic customers, but it appears the two companies share one large customer. The post Symbotic acquires auto...

item.title: Boston Dynamics CEO Robert Playter steps down
item.description: Amanda McMaster, the company's CFO, will take over as interim CEO until Boston Dynamics' board of directors finds its next leader. The post Boston Dyn...

item.title: APEM launches Dual Icon series of LED indicators
item.description: APEM's Dual Icon indicators use green and red filters combined with vivid LED lighting to produce a 120° viewing angle. The post APEM launches Dual Ic...

item.title: Stryker introduces Mako Handheld Robotics with RPS launch
item.description: New handheld robotic system combines Stryker’s proven Mako robotic technology with its power tool capabilities. The post Stryker introduces Mako Handh...
